sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n26435" key="didu/mozuc" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δῐδῠ´μο-ζυξ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ῠγος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> foreg., <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">δίφρος</foreign> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2045.tlg001.perseus-grc1:21:212" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">21.212</biblScope> </bibl>; <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">αὐλός</foreign> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2045.tlg001.perseus-grc1:23:211" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">23.211</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
